query: Trump health status May 2025 2026 medical emergency hospitalization news
answer:
I now have comprehensive data. Here is my full synthesis:

---

# Trump Health Status: May 2025 – May 2026

## Overview

Donald Trump (age 78–80 during this period) has experienced a series of escalating health concerns — both physical and cognitive — throughout 2025 and into 2026. While **no acute medical emergency or major hospitalization** has been publicly reported, there has been a gradual accumulation of chronic health issues, cognitive concerns, and politically significant calls for his removal via the 25th Amendment, reaching a crescendo in April 2026 amid the Iran war.

---

## Physical Health

### April 2025 Physical Exam
- Trump underwent a physical exam on approximately **April 13, 2025**, with a reported weight of **224 pounds**.
- He visited **Walter Reed National Military Medical Center** for this exam.

### Chronic Venous Insufficiency (July 2025)
- Trump was diagnosed with **chronic venous insufficiency**, a circulatory condition affecting blood flow in the legs.
- This condition was cited as contributing to recurring **large bruises on his hands**, along with aspirin use.

### Second Walter Reed Visit (October 2025)
- Trump made a second visit to Walter Reed in **October 2025** — the purpose was not fully disclosed.
- An **undisclosed MRI scan** was also conducted at an unspecified point in 2025.

### Facial Drooping (September 2025)
- Photographs from **September 2025** showed what appeared to be **facial drooping**, raising further public concern.

---

## Cognitive and Mental Fitness Concerns

### Reports of Declining Engagement (2025–2026)
- Multiple reports of Trump **"dozing" during public appearances and Cabinet meetings**.
- Reports that Trump requested **"fewer, more important meetings."**

### VP Vance "Ready to Become President" (August 27, 2025)
- Vice President JD Vance publicly stated he was **"ready to become president,"** sparking widespread speculation about Trump's health condition.

### Greenland/Iceland Confusion (Early 2026)
- During the Greenland crisis, Trump **repeatedly confused Greenland with Iceland**, prompting the first Democratic calls for invoking the 25th Amendment in 2026.

### April 2026 Escalation
This was the most intense period of health-related political pressure:

- **April 7, 2026**: Trump posted on Truth Social: *"A whole civilization will die tonight, never to be brought back again,"* triggering bipartisan 25th Amendment calls.
- **50+ House Democrats** called for invoking the 25th Amendment, later growing to **70+ calling for impeachment**.
- **Marjorie Taylor Greene** (previously a close Trump ally) stated: *"I think we have to truly question the mental stability of any president that threatens to wipe out an entire civilization."*
- **April 14, 2026**: Rep. Jamie Raskin wrote to the White House physician requesting a *"comprehensive neuropsychological assessment."*
- **April 17, 2026**: Former Trump White House counsel **Ty Cobb** publicly stated Trump displayed *"symptoms of dementia"* with linguistic changes *"suggestive of the absence of any frontal lobe controls."*
- Trump himself reportedly stated his brain *"does not function very well."*
- Former allies **Alex Jones** also expressed doubts about Trump's lucidity.

---

## 25th Amendment and Political Implications

- As of May 2026, the **25th Amendment has NOT been invoked**. VP Vance has NOT served as acting president.
- Section 4 (involuntary transfer of powers) has **never been invoked** in U.S. history.
- The White House dismissed all mental fitness concerns, praising Trump's *"sharpness, unmatched energy, and historic accessibility."*

### Prediction Market Prices (as of April 14, 2026)
| Market | Probability | Volume |
|---|---|---|
| Trump resigns before term ends | **21%** | $182,088 (Kalshi) |
| Trump impeached & removed | **28%** | $354,419 (Kalshi) |
| 25th Amendment used during presidency | **30%** | $105,962 (Kalshi) |
| Trump impeachment before 2028 | **68%** | N/A (Kalshi, per Defi Rate) |

### Approval Rating
- Trump's approval rating fell **below 30%** by approximately April 3, 2026 (CNN, WoWTV), driven primarily by the unpopular Iran war but compounded by health concerns.

---

## Key Conclusion

There has been **no single acute medical emergency or hospitalization crisis** — the health narrative has been one of **gradual, chronic deterioration** (physical and cognitive) that became politically explosive in April 2026 due to the Iran war context. The situation has generated significant political pressure but has not resulted in any formal constitutional action as of May 2026.

---
